title: スーパークリーク登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek's preparations for the Twinkle Series
have begun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gets excited about winning all sorts of titles
in order to spoil me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I vow to become stronger so I can help her
achieve her goals.
